meaning: n.极限,最大可能,极力adj.极度的,最远的
examples: Our resources are strained to the utmost.
This is a matter of the utmost importance.
He would have done his utmost to help her.
Actor Warwick Davis told BBC News he had the utmost respect for someone with such a great career.
We are doing our utmost to help them out with volunteers from our company.
